name: Eel Livornese
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds eel, from sea or river, peeled and gutted
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the eel and cut into 4-inch long pieces. Pat dry.
2. Preheat oven to 450°F.
3. In an oven- and stove-proof earthenware pot, place tomato sauce, red wine, caper berries, olives, and chili flakes over medium heat. Bring to a boil.
4. Season eel pieces with salt and pepper. Place into the boiling sauce.
5. Put the eel into the oven and bake until cooked through, about 20 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven. Sprinkle with chopped fennel fronds and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
